overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking along a forest mountain trail. The character traverses rocky terrain and pine forests with expansive valley views opening up ahead. The scene features high-fidelity game engine graphics with dynamic lighting filtering through the trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky forest trail with cliff wall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the forest trail navigating around rocky outcrops

entered.detail: large moss-covered boulders and scattered rocks lining the trail
tall evergreen pine trees forming dense forest canopy
steep rock wall rising on the right side of the trail
winding dirt path with patches of grass and gravel

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with the character walking through a rocky forested area. Large boulders and rocky terrain line the dirt trail while a cliff face rises on the right. Tall pine trees create a dense canopy overhead with sunlight filtering through.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain overlook trail with valley views

events.description: trail opens up revealing expansive mountain valley view on the left

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail as the forest opens to reveal valley vistas

entered.detail: deep valley with river and forest visible in the distance
hazy blue mountain peaks visible through the forest gap

segments.scene_description: As the character progresses, the forest trail opens into a wide overlook with views of a deep mountain valley on the left. The rocky terrain gives way to a clearer path while distant mountain ranges become visible through the trees ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: alpine forest trail with snow-capped peaks

events.description: character raises right hand to touch brim of hat while walking

agents.ego_description: walking along the trail and briefly tipping his hat with his right hand

entered.detail: tall mountain with snow-covered summit visible between the pine trees

segments.scene_description: The final segment features the character walking toward a stunning view of snow-capped mountains visible through the forest canopy. The valley view becomes more prominent on the left. At around 50 seconds, the character briefly raises his hand to his hat before continuing along the alpine trail.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense, rocky forest that gradually opens into an expansive alpine vista. It begins with the character traversing a dirt trail flanked by large boulders and a rising cliff face, where sunlight filters through a thick canopy of tall pine trees. As the character progresses, the enclosed forest trail expands into a wide overlook, shifting the perspective to reveal a deep mountain valley on the left and distant ranges appearing through the trees. The scene then opens further toward a stunning view of snow-capped peaks visible through the canopy, with the valley becoming more prominent as the character briefly raises a hand to his hat before continuing along the alpine path.
